creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
www/tomcat8 has been EoL for over a year and has finally been deprecated with
an expiration date of 2019-06-30.  www/guacamole-client depends on it and
the TOMCAT option might be marked broken after that point.  Can it be switched
over to one of the newer www/tomcat* ports, www/tomcat85 or www/tomcat9 ?
